text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Air Groove to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. The thought of falling behind due to such a
small injury is...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry, I should've been more cautious.
I'm sorry, I should've been more cautious.
We'll make up for it when you're all better!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. The thought of falling behind due to such a
small injury is...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry, I should've been more cautious.
I'm sorry, I should've been more cautious.
We'll make up for it when you're all better!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was the one doing the exercise—I'm the one who
needs to reflect on what happened.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This makes for a good lesson though.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I shall strive to avoid repeating such a careless
mistake in the future.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Easier said than done. Every second wasted is a
second you'll never get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This failure on my part will continue to haunt me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is accept the loss and double down
on my training once I recover.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Easier said than done. You can't make up for lost
time with a run-of-the-mill work ethic.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you understand the consequences of what
you're insinuating?
choice_data_list: We'll both give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then get ready to continue training at a moment's
notice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back at it as soon as I've recovered from
this irksome injury!
